title: habenaria meeana
intro: Habenaria meeana, also known as the Meeana's Habenaria, is a species of orchid native to India and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Habenaria meeana include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat various skin conditions. Habenaria meeana is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and topical creams.
